title: TopLuck
description: This plugin allows you to see if your players have luck... or are cheaters
body:
# 🍀 TopLuck

**TopLuck** is a sophisticated plugin for monitoring anti-cheat measures on Minecraft servers. 🧠
It tracks the "luck" 🍀 or rarity of loot acquired by players in real time, assisting administrators in identifying unusual activities like **x-ray usage**, **auto-mining bots**, or **exploit misuses**. 🛡️

This plugin offers **extensive statistical analysis** 📊 of loot behavior and highlights **anomalies** that deviate from standard drop rates.
Whether you're running a **competitive survival server** ⚔️ or a **semi-vanilla SMP** 🏞️, TopLuck provides an **effective**, **invisible**, and **behavior-based** method of cheat detection — going beyond hitbox and movement triggers. 👀

---

## 🔍 Main Highlights

### ⛏️ Real-Time Loot Tracking

* Monitors:

  * Rare block mining (e.g. diamond, netherite)
  * Mob drops (e.g. skulls, blaze rods)
  * Structure loot (e.g. chests in temples, bastions)
  * Fishing rewards 🎣
* Calculates a **"luck score"** for each player based on frequency and probability.

---

### 🏆 Player Ranking

* Command `/topluck` displays:

  * The **luckiest players** currently online
  * Detailed **statistics**, **loot counts**, and **anomaly percentages** 📈

---

### 🚨 Suspicious Behavior Detection

* Automatically alerts moderators when:

  * A player's loot rate exceeds a configurable threshold (e.g. 300% above average)
* Alert methods:

  * Chat messages 💬
  * BossBar 🪄
  * ActionBar 📢
  * Discord webhook 🔗

---

### 📚 Loot History & Logs

* Stores full loot logs in **SQLite** or **MySQL** 🗃️
* Commands available for searching and browsing player history
* Export formats: **CSV** 📄 and **JSON** 🧾 for advanced analysis

---

### 🖼️ Modern Interface Options

* Optional visual displays:

  * Scoreboard 📋
  * Tab list prefixes 🏷️
  * Temporary BossBars for live alerts
  * Web live dashboard

---

### 🔧 Fully Configurable

* YAML-based configuration 📂:

  * Enable/disable specific loot categories
  * Set tracking windows and thresholds
  * Customize alert channels and storage duration

---

### 🔌 Plugin Integration

* **Public API** for external access 🌐
* **PlaceholderAPI support** for use in GUIs, signs, or chat formats

---

## ✅ Use Cases

* 🔎 Detecting players mining **too many diamonds** 💎 too quickly
* 🧟 Identifying **abnormally frequent rare drops** (e.g. skulls, books)
* 🕵️ Passive, **non-invasive anti-cheat** detection
* 🏗️ Monitoring suspicious activity in **competitive or semi-vanilla environments**
